title: OpenFold Protein Structure Prediction
description: A mini-implementation of OpenFold for protein structure prediction, built with PyTorch and optimized for NVIDIA tensor cores using CUDA. Focused on GPU-level performance tuning for computationally intensive biological modeling.

title: Chess Agent
description: An AI chess engine using minimax with alpha-beta pruning, handling all standard rules including castling, en passant, and promotion.

title: Sentiment Analysis
description: An NLP pipeline for text sentiment classification on the IMDb dataset, comparing LSTM and Conv1D architectures built with TensorFlow.

title: Tourism Recommender & Chatbot
description: A rule-based recommender system with a Google Dialogflow chatbot integration, weighted scoring engine, and responsive web interface. Published in IJRASET.

title: Neural Network From Scratch
description: A modular neural network implementation for MNIST digit recognition with custom forward and backpropagation, multiple optimizers, and loss functions—no frameworks, just NumPy.
